positive: A stylized, central illustration of a whimsical forest creature—a gentle fox mixed with a deer, lounging among overgrown botanical elements. The creature has soft, vibrant colors (burnt orange, moss green, cream) and expressive, curious eyes. The composition is highly symmetrical and balanced, designed for a clean apparel print. Surround the creature with elegant, stylized flora: giant mushrooms, delicate fern fronds, and glowing bioluminescent moss patches. Use a detailed woodcut etching style mixed with modern vector art aesthetics. Strong black outlines, limited color palette for print effectiveness, high contrast, deep blacks, and bright, flat areas of color. Cinematic, natural light source from the upper right corner casting soft, complementary shadows.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, logo, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low detail, ugly, disfigured, monochrome, photorealistic, 3d render, copyright
